items.title: 'American Exceptionalism Trade' Gains Steam As Dollar, S&P 500 Surge In Lockstep: Bank Of America
items.author: Piero Cingari
items.description: The 'American exceptionalism' trade is making a comeback, with U.S. equities outperforming international stocks and the U.S. dollar rallying since the election. This signals renewed investor confidence in America's economic resilience.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article mentions that international stocks, as tracked by the iShares MSCI ACWI ex U.S. ETF, have underperformed U.S. equities since the election.
The article briefly mentions the Boeing strike as a temporary factor that may impact the November employment report, but does not provide any further insights on the company.
